title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
